business_rules: Orders can use a 7-day refund window before activation.
Activated orders are not eligible for no-reason refunds.

turns.user: I bought the course yesterday. Can I get a refund?
turns.assistant: I can help check that. Was the course already activated?
retrieval_context: Refund eligibility depends on whether the course was activated.

turns.user: Yes, it was activated, but I have not watched it.
turns.assistant: If the course has already been activated, it usually cannot use a no-reason refund. If there is a product issue, I can help you submit an after-sales request.
retrieval_context: Activated orders are not eligible for no-reason refunds.
Product issues can go through after-sales support.

matched_rules: Activated orders are not eligible for no-reason refunds.
Product issues can go through after-sales support.
